ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Starting position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* Ending position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene function and properties */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species the gene belongs to */,
  "ncbi_id" TEXT /* NCBI ID of the gene for external reference */,
  "gene_family" TEXT /* Gene family based on homology */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the gene record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment applied to the sample */,
  "timepoint" INTEGER /* Timepoint at which the sample was taken */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample characteristics */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the sample */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sample (e.g., tissue, cell line) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "collection_site" TEXT /* Location where the sample was collected */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the sample record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expression_data" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression data entry */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the gene in the sample */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the expression level */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the expression level */,
  "fold_change" REAL /* Fold change in expression level compared to a control */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the expression level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the expression data record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_data_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_data_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User's contact phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the gene */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the gene was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the gene */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device accessing the gene */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for tracking user sessions */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the access log record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., GO term, pathway) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the annotation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the annotation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time of the annotation record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)
